overall.description: First-person driving gameplay from Cyberpunk 2077 through a rain-soaked futuristic city at night. The vehicle navigates neon-lit streets, stops at traffic lights, and turns through intersections while passing holographic advertisements and a mix of modern skyscrapers with traditional Japanese architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic downtown avenue with neon signage

agents.ego_description: driving forward through rain-soaked multi-lane street, maintaining steady speed

entered.detail: tall futuristic glass building with illuminated windows rising on the left side
large pink neon advertisement sign mounted on building facade
floating holographic advertisement visible in the distance above the road
futuristic street lamp emitting cyan blue light along the sidewalk
yellow zebra crossing markings on the wet asphalt road

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a first-person view from inside a vehicle driving through a rain-soaked cyberpunk city street at night. Neon signs and holographic advertisements illuminate the wet asphalt while futuristic glass towers line the left side of the road. The vehicle maintains a steady speed through the moderate traffic.

scene_state.functional_zone: major intersection approach with overhead gantry

events.description: approaching large intersection with overhead traffic gantry and digital billboards

agents.ego_description: continuing forward through the avenue, approaching a major intersection with traffic control

entered.detail: large overhead road structure spanning the intersection with traffic signs
massive digital screen displaying advertisements on the left building
traffic signal showing green light suspended over the road

segments.scene_description: The vehicle approaches a major intersection marked by an overhead traffic gantry. Large digital billboards become visible on the left while the traffic light ahead shows green. The road widens as the vehicle nears the crossing, with yellow crosswalk markings becoming prominent on the wet pavement.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy intersection with traffic stop and left turn

events.description: stopping at red traffic light behind a brown van waiting at the intersection
executing a left turn at the intersection after the traffic light changes

agents.ego_description: stopping at the red light behind a van, then turning left onto a new street

notable_agents.action: brown van stopped at the red light directly ahead of the ego vehicle

entered.detail: rust-colored delivery van stopped at the traffic light ahead
building with traditional architectural elements visible on the right corner
orange and white striped road barrier along the left side of the street

segments.scene_description: The vehicle stops at a red traffic light behind a brown van at the intersection. Pedestrians with umbrellas cross the street in the rain. After the light changes, the vehicle executes a left turn, revealing traditional architectural elements mixed with the futuristic cityscape on the new street.

events.description: entering commercial district dominated by large holographic billboards and digital signage

agents.ego_description: accelerating down the new street passing large digital advertisements and neon storefronts

entered.detail: large floating holographic billboard displaying product advertisements
bright neon sign for an arcade or entertainment venue on the right
tall digital advertising pillar standing in the center of the view
building facade covered entirely with giant digital screens

segments.scene_description: Driving through a dense commercial district filled with massive holographic advertisements and building-sized digital screens. The street is lined with orange road barriers and neon-lit storefronts. The rain continues to fall heavily, reflecting the colorful neon lights on the wet pavement.

scene_state.functional_zone: mixed traditional and futuristic architecture district

events.description: passing traditional Japanese gate structure juxtaposed with cyberpunk neon signage

agents.ego_description: continuing through the city street passing a mix of traditional and modern architecture

entered.detail: traditional Japanese torii-style gate with wooden structure and curved roof
multi-tiered pagoda roof visible behind the gate on the left side
contemporary building covered in bright neon signage and digital displays

segments.scene_description: The final segment features a striking contrast between traditional Japanese architecture, including a wooden gate and pagoda structure on the left, and the futuristic cyberpunk cityscape with neon signs on the right. The vehicle continues driving through the rain-soaked streets as the environment blends historical and futuristic elements.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective from inside a vehicle as it navigates a rain-slicked cyberpunk street toward a wide, neon-lit intersection. It begins by gliding past futuristic glass towers and holographic advertisements that cast vibrant reflections across the wet asphalt. As the vehicle maintains its steady pace through moderate traffic, the surrounding architecture shifts to include larger digital billboards that loom over the left side of the road. The scene then expands as the vehicle approaches a major crossing, passing under an overhead traffic gantry while the road widens. Finally, the camera moves toward a green light, with bright yellow crosswalk markings becoming prominent on the shimmering pavement.

The shot follows a continuous drive through a rain-soaked futuristic city that evolves from a mundane urban intersection into a dense neon commercial district and finally a blend of historical and cyberpunk architecture. It begins with the vehicle idling at a red light behind a brown van as pedestrians with umbrellas cross the street, before executing a left turn that reveals the first hints of traditional design mixed with the cityscape. As the vehicle accelerates, the scene shifts into a dense commercial corridor dominated by massive holographic advertisements and building-sized digital screens that cast vibrant reflections across the wet pavement and orange road barriers. The environment then expands into a striking visual contrast, where the camera passes a wooden gate and pagoda structure on the left while neon signs continue to glow on the right. The movement concludes as the vehicle drives further into the rain, seamlessly merging these historical elements with the surrounding high-tech metropolis.
